title: Light Anvil
description: This mod replaces the expensive vanilla anvil recipe with a much cheaper version using iron ingots and only a single iron block for Minecraft 1.21.11.
body:
# ⚒️ Light Anvil
## 📊 Economical Crafting
Reduced iron cost
Uses only 1 iron block instead of 3
Craftable with standard iron ingots

## ⚖️ Balanced Progression
Perfect for early-game survival
Reduces the grind for new players
Keeps the vanilla feel intact

## 🧩 Seamless Integration
Replaces the vanilla recipe completely
No duplicate entries in the recipe book
Automatic recipe unlocking when iron is found

## 🚀 Ultra Lightweight
Minimal resource footprint
Data-driven (no unnecessary background code)
Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.11![An Image of the Inventory while Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d073c384db70b25854699dc20d04d6986c3846af.png)
